name: Llama 3
tagline: Initial Llama 3 release in 8B and 70B dense text models, pretrained on a much larger token budget than Llama 2.
metaDescription: Llama 3 (Meta), released 2024-04-18 — part of the Llama 3 line. Initial Llama 3 release in 8B and 70B dense text models, pretrained on a much larger token budg…
overview: Llama 3 is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 3 line. Released 2024-04-18. The previous-generation open-weight dense (text and vision) Llama line, spanning the 3.0 through 3.3 point releases.
What's notable in this version: Initial Llama 3 release in 8B and 70B dense text models, pretrained on a much larger token budget than Llama 2.
